query: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.totalROI, s.finalWallet, s.monkeyValue, s.tickers, ROUND((CAST(s.finalWallet AS DECIMAL(12,2)) - CAST(s.monkeyValue AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / CAST(s.monkeyValue AS DECIMAL(12,2)) * 100, 1) as alphaVsMonkey FROM labSimulations s WHERE s.status = 'done' AND s.totalROI IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(s.totalROI AS DECIMAL(10,2)) DESC LIMIT 8;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT s.id, s.name, s.totalROI, s.finalWallet, s.monkeyValue, s.tickers, ROUND((CAST(s.finalWallet AS DECIMAL(12,2)) - CAST(s.monkeyValue AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / CAST(s.monkeyValue AS DECIMAL(12,2)) * 100, 1) as alphaVsMonkey FROM labSimulations s WHERE s.status = 'done' AND s.totalROI IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(s.totalROI AS DECIMAL(10,2)) DESC LIMIT 8;
